newsSince: On June 22, 2026 Mkango (via HyProMag USA) issued a Texas Hub / Ironhead project update: increased projected magnet production capacity, started procurement of long-lead equipment, and is advancing feedstock aggregation and offtake talks toward H2 2027 commissioning. This is fresh, positive commercialization progress for the rare-earth-magnet recycling platform. Stock roughly flat (-1.1%).

sources.label: Mkango: HyProMag USA Texas Hub / US magnet platform update

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens treats permanent magnets as a pick-and-shovel bottleneck. The June 22 HyProMag USA update (raised capacity, long-lead equipment ordering, H2 2027 commissioning, offtake talks) is genuinely new commercialization evidence strengthening the recycling-capacity-coming-online thesis vs June 9 hold.
verdicts.bull: Non-obvious magnet pick-and-shovel with UK/German plants live and US Texas Hub advancing into long-lead procurement; offtake talks de-risk the ramp.
verdicts.neutral: Capacity is still pre-commissioning (H2 2027); cash burn warrants watching.
verdicts.bear: Microcap ($230M) pre-revenue on magnets; financing and timeline slippage risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Texas Hub commissioning and US magnet offtake agreements
verdicts.primaryRisk: Funding needs / commissioning delay before recycling capacity scales
